condenser_jet.purpose: Improve efficiency by condensing exhaust steam
condenser_jet.description: Vessel where exhaust steam meets cold injection water to condense and create vacuum.

cooling_tank_wooden.name: wooden cooling tank
cooling_tank_wooden.purpose: Cool water for condenser or process
cooling_tank_wooden.description: Large timber tank used to cool or store process water.

feedwater_pump_simple.name: simple feedwater pump
feedwater_pump_simple.description: Steam- or mechanically-driven pump that forces water into a pressurized boiler.

clay_casting_pit.name: clay casting pit
clay_casting_pit.description: Shallow clay-lined pit with sand molds for casting heavy iron parts like fireboxes and cylinders.

iron_plate_hand.name: hammered iron plate
iron_plate_hand.purpose: Flat plate for boilers and straps
iron_plate_hand.description: Hand-hammered wrought-iron plate used for boiler shells, brackets, and structural straps.

iron_rod_wrought.name: wrought-iron rod
iron_rod_wrought.purpose: Rod stock for shafts and fasteners
iron_rod_wrought.description: Round wrought-iron rod used for small shafts, tie rods, and fastener blanks.

iron_rivet_hand.name: hand-forged iron rivet
iron_rivet_hand.description: Short wrought-iron rivet used hot to fasten boiler plates and straps together.

beam_frame_wrought.name: beam frame
beam_frame_wrought.description: Heavy wrought-iron and timber frame that carries the main beam, cylinder, and crank gear of a simple engine.

crank_iron_forged.name: forged iron crank
crank_iron_forged.description: Forged crank arm keyed to a shaft, converting beam motion into rotary motion for flywheel and line shaft.

connecting_rod_wrought.name: wrought-iron connecting rod
connecting_rod_wrought.description: Long wrought-iron rod with bearings at each end, transmitting motion between beam, crank, or pump.

gland_packing_steam.name: steam gland packing
gland_packing_steam.description: Braided fiber packing soaked in tallow used to seal piston and pump rods where they pass through stuffing boxes.

safety_valve_weighted.name: weighted safety valve
safety_valve_weighted.description: Springless safety valve held shut by an adjustable weight, lifting to vent steam if boiler pressure rises too high.

boiler_lagging_mat.name: boiler lagging
boiler_lagging_mat.description: Layers of plant-fiber felt or straw under wooden staves, wrapped around boilers to cut heat loss and protect workers.

coal_bituminous.name: bituminous coal
coal_bituminous.description: Bituminous coal suitable for coking and direct combustion. The fuel that breaks charcoal production limits and makes stationary steam power practical at scale.

limestone_flux.name: limestone flux
limestone_flux.description: Limestone crushed to gravel size for blast furnace and forge use. At smelting temperatures CaCO3 decomposes to CaO (quicklime), which reacts with silica gangue to form fluid slag.

coke_oven_beehive.name: coke oven (beehive)
coke_oven_beehive.description: Low, dome-shaped brick oven that bakes coal without air to drive off volatiles and leave coke.

coke_fuel.name: coke fuel
coke_fuel.description: Porous high-carbon fuel made from bituminous coal in a beehive oven; ideal for blast furnaces.

fireclay_refractory.name: fireclay (refractory)
fireclay_refractory.description: Alumina-rich clay that withstands high furnace temperatures without slumping.

refractory_brick_fireclay.name: fireclay refractory brick
refractory_brick_fireclay.description: Pressed and fired fireclay bricks used to line blast furnaces and steel converters.

refractory_brick_silica.name: silica refractory brick
refractory_brick_silica.purpose: Roof and crown for very hot furnaces
refractory_brick_silica.description: High-silica brick for furnace crowns where temperatures and slag chemistry are harsh.

burned_lime_quicklime.name: burned lime (quicklime)
burned_lime_quicklime.description: Limestone burned in a kiln to drive off CO₂, yielding reactive quicklime for flux and mortar.

blast_furnace_small.name: small blast furnace
blast_furnace_small.purpose: Smelt ore to pig iron using coke and flux
blast_furnace_small.description: Tall shaft furnace charged with ore, coke, and limestone; blown with air to produce pig iron and slag.

pig_iron_ingot.name: pig iron ingot
pig_iron_ingot.description: High-carbon iron tapped from a blast furnace and cast into pigs; too brittle for direct use.

slag_ironmaking.name: blast-furnace slag
slag_ironmaking.description: Calcium-rich glassy byproduct from flux and gangue in the blast-furnace charge.

hot_blast_stove.name: hot-blast stove
hot_blast_stove.description: Checker-brick stove that stores heat from furnace gas and reheats incoming blast air.

bessemer_converter_basic.name: Bessemer converter
bessemer_converter_basic.purpose: Blow carbon out of pig iron to make steel
bessemer_converter_basic.description: Large tilting vessel where air is blown through molten pig iron to burn excess carbon and impurities.

open_hearth_furnace_basic.name: open-hearth furnace
open_hearth_furnace_basic.purpose: Refine pig iron and scrap into steel
open_hearth_furnace_basic.description: Regenerative furnace that slowly refines pig iron and scrap into steel on a shallow hearth.

steel_ingot.name: steel ingot
steel_ingot.description: Low- to medium-carbon steel cast into ingots from converter or open-hearth furnace.

steel_plate_rolled.name: rolled steel plate
steel_plate_rolled.description: Wrought steel plate rolled from ingots, used for boilers, tanks, and structural work.

steel_rail.name: steel rail
steel_rail.purpose: Track for heavy wagons and rail
steel_rail.description: Rolled steel rail profile for carrying locomotives or heavy mine carts.

steel_beam.name: rolled steel beam
steel_beam.description: Rolled structural beam used to support engine houses and overhead line shafts.

steel_shaft.name: turned steel shaft
steel_shaft.description: Machined steel shaft for higher-speed power transmission than wooden shafts.

copper_ingot_refined.name: refined copper ingot
copper_ingot_refined.purpose: Base metal for wire and windings
copper_ingot_refined.description: Conductive copper ingot refined for use in electrical wire and dynamo coils.

copper_wire_drawn.name: drawn copper wire
copper_wire_drawn.purpose: Base conductor for coils and lines
copper_wire_drawn.description: Soft-drawn copper wire suitable for windings, bus bars, or short-distance lines.

copper_wire_insulated.name: insulated copper wire
copper_wire_insulated.purpose: Safe wiring for buildings and dynamos
copper_wire_insulated.description: Copper wire wrapped in cloth or gutta-percha insulation to reduce shorts and leakage.

porcelain_insulator_pin.name: porcelain pin insulator
porcelain_insulator_pin.description: Glazed porcelain insulator mounted on pins to keep wires clear of wooden poles.

wood_pole_power.name: wooden power pole
wood_pole_power.description: Preserved timber pole used to carry insulators and conductors across distance.

switchboard_panel_wooden.name: wooden switchboard panel
switchboard_panel_wooden.description: Heavy board backing for early switchgear with open knife-switches and fuses.

knife_switch_heavy.name: heavy knife switch
knife_switch_heavy.description: Exposed-blade switch that opens or closes a circuit on a switchboard.

fuse_rewireable.name: rewireable fuse
fuse_rewireable.description: Small ceramic carrier with replaceable fuse wire sized for the circuit load.

dynamo_dc_workshop.name: DC dynamo (workshop)
dynamo_dc_workshop.purpose: Convert mechanical power to DC electricity
dynamo_dc_workshop.description: Self-excited DC dynamo driven from a steam line shaft; supplies power for lights and motors.

magnet_core_wrought.name: wrought-iron magnet core
magnet_core_wrought.description: Soft wrought-iron core shaped for field magnets in dynamos and motors.

incandescent_lamp_carbon.name: incandescent lamp (carbon)
incandescent_lamp_carbon.description: Glass bulb with evacuated carbon filament; early but fragile source of electric light.

lamp_fixture_industrial.name: industrial lamp fixture
lamp_fixture_industrial.description: Ceiling or wall fixture with socket, reflector, and guard for incandescent lamps.

electric_motor_small_dc.name: small DC motor
electric_motor_small_dc.description: Compact DC motor using field coils and commutator; suitable for fans, drills, or pumps.

bus_bar_copper.name: copper bus bar
bus_bar_copper.description: Thick copper bar used to carry main current along a switchboard or distribution board.

rolling_mill_steam.name: rolling mill (steam)
rolling_mill_steam.description: Steam-driven rolling mill with powered rollers for plate, beams, and rails.

machine_shop_steam.name: machine shop (steam)
machine_shop_steam.description: Line-shaft-driven workshop with lathes, drills, and planers for iron and steel work.

wire_drawing_bench.name: wire-drawing bench
wire_drawing_bench.purpose: Draw metal rods down into wire
wire_drawing_bench.description: Bench with drawplates and capstan that pulls soft metal rods through dies to produce wire.

glass_tube.name: borosilicate glass tube
glass_tube.description: Drawn glass tube from melted silica. Used for lamp bulbs, instrument sight-glasses, and chemical cells. Requires a hot lampworking flame to form.

glass_bench.name: glass bench
glass_bench.purpose: Shape and seal small glass parts
glass_bench.description: Bench with lampworking burner for drawing glass tubing, sealing bulbs, and attaching lamp bases.

machine_shop_electric.name: machine shop (electric)
machine_shop_electric.purpose: Upgrade shop with small electric motors
machine_shop_electric.description: Improved machine shop where line shafting is supplemented or replaced by small DC motors.

steel_rivet.name: steel rivet
steel_rivet.description: Short steel pin driven and upset hot to clamp plates, angles, and beams together.

steel_angle_bar.name: rolled steel angle
steel_angle_bar.purpose: L-shaped section for frames and supports
steel_angle_bar.description: Rolled steel angle used for light framing, brackets, and engine-house structures.

steel_gusset_plate.name: steel gusset plate
steel_gusset_plate.description: Heavy steel plate drilled for rivets, tying beams, columns, or trestle members together.

carbon_filament_preform.name: carbon filament preform
carbon_filament_preform.description: Thin, treated plant-fiber strip baked to drive off volatiles, ready to be sealed into bulbs as a carbon filament.

lamp_socket_porcelain.name: porcelain lamp socket
lamp_socket_porcelain.description: Glazed porcelain lampholder with metal contacts and threads for mounting carbon lamps in fixtures.

armature_core_laminated.name: laminated armature core
armature_core_laminated.purpose: Core for dynamo and motor armatures
armature_core_laminated.description: Stack of thin steel laminations keyed to a shaft to carry windings while reducing eddy-current losses.

commutator_copper_segmented.name: segmented copper commutator
commutator_copper_segmented.description: Ring of insulated copper segments mounted on a shaft, used to rectify armature output in dynamos and motors.

brush_block_carbon.name: carbon brush block
brush_block_carbon.description: Pressed carbon block and braid used to carry current to spinning commutators with low wear and noise.

lathe_workshop.name: engine lathe (workshop)
lathe_workshop.purpose: Turn rod stock into shafts, axles, screws, and pins
lathe_workshop.description: A shaft-driven engine lathe. Mounts rod stock in a 3-jaw chuck and turns it against a carriage tool. Needs a rotational drive on its left face -- a waterwheel or steam-engine line shaft.

coal_tar.name: coal tar
coal_tar.purpose: Aromatic byproduct of high-temperature coke ovens
coal_tar.description: Dense black liquid condensed from coke-oven off-gas during slot-oven carbonization at 900-1200 degrees C. Contains benzene, naphthalene, anthracene, and coal-tar pitch. Distillation fractions feed electrode binders, acrylonitrile, epoxy resin, and carbon fiber precursor routes.

dc_charge.name: DC power charge
dc_charge.purpose: One unit of direct-current electrical energy
dc_charge.description: A discrete charge of DC electricity produced by a workshop dynamo. Consumed by early DC machines and electrochemical processes. DC and AC charges are NOT interchangeable -- use a mercury arc rectifier to convert AC→DC.

ac_charge.name: AC power charge
ac_charge.purpose: One unit of alternating-current electrical energy
ac_charge.description: A discrete charge of AC electricity produced by an AC generator. Consumed by AC induction motors and later industrial machines. AC charges carry more power per unit than DC at transmission scale -- step up with a transformer for long runs.

a_frame_gin_pole.name: A-frame gin pole
a_frame_gin_pole.description: Simple A-frame with a pulley for lifting stones, logs, or machine parts.

alarm_bell_electric.name: electric alarm bell
alarm_bell_electric.description: Wall-mounted electric alarm bell driven by control circuits for hazards and status changes.

cnc_lathe_basic.name: basic CNC lathe
cnc_lathe_basic.description: Numerically controlled engine lathe for precise shaft, rod and flange work.
cnc_lathe_basic.recipe: plc_rack_basic + plc_cpu_module + 4x steel_shaft + 2x steel_beam + motor_ac_induction_small -> cnc_lathe_basic

cnc_mill_basic.name: basic CNC mill
cnc_mill_basic.description: Three-axis CNC milling machine for plates, housings and precision brackets.
cnc_mill_basic.recipe: plc_rack_basic + plc_cpu_module + 3x steel_beam + steel_plate_rolled + motor_ac_induction_small -> cnc_mill_basic

computer_industrial_rugged.name: rugged industrial computer
computer_industrial_rugged.description: Panel-mounted industrial PC hardened against dust, vibration and temperature swings.
computer_industrial_rugged.recipe: plc_rack_basic + plc_cpu_module + plc_io_module + steel_plate_rolled + incandescent_lamp_carbon + bus_bar_copper -> computer_industrial_rugged

control_valve_steam.name: steam control valve
control_valve_steam.description: Actuated globe valve that modulates steam flow to engines, turbines or process loads.

controller_regulator_pneumatic.name: pneumatic regulator
controller_regulator_pneumatic.description: Pneumatic regulator for holding pressure, level or flow at a setpoint.

controller_program_cartridge.name: controller program cartridge
controller_program_cartridge.description: Removable memory cartridge carrying ladder or sequence programs for PLC and CNC controllers.

conveyor_powered.name: powered conveyor segment
conveyor_powered.description: Powered belt or roller conveyor segment for continuous, hands-off material transport.

cooling_tower_pair.name: cooling tower pair
cooling_tower_pair.description: Paired draft cooling towers that dump condenser heat to the atmosphere for large power plants.

diode_silicon_small.name: small silicon diode
diode_silicon_small.description: Low-power silicon diode used for rectifiers, clamps and signal steering.

filament_supply_dc.name: lamp filament DC supply
filament_supply_dc.description: Stabilised low-voltage DC supply used to drive incandescent or experimental lamp filaments.

generator_ac_small.name: small AC generator
generator_ac_small.description: Compact alternator for workshop drives or test rigs, delivering modest three-phase AC power.
generator_ac_small.recipe: steel_shaft + armature_core_laminated + magnet_core_wrought + copper_wire_insulated + steel_plate_rolled -> generator_ac_small

generator_ac_three_phase.name: three-phase AC generator
generator_ac_three_phase.description: Large synchronous alternator providing three-phase AC into the main plant switchyard.

ground_station_dish.name: ground station dish
ground_station_dish.description: High-gain tracking dish with RF front-end for talking to satellites and orbital platforms.

instrument_ammeter_panel.name: panel ammeter
instrument_ammeter_panel.description: Panel-mounted ammeter for monitoring DC or AC current draw on feeders and machines.

instrument_pressure_high.name: high-pressure gauge
instrument_pressure_high.description: Bourdon-tube gauge rated for boiler drums, steam lines and other high-pressure circuits.

instrument_voltmeter_panel.name: panel voltmeter
instrument_voltmeter_panel.description: Panel voltmeter for watching line or bus voltage on DC and AC distribution boards.

logic_module_and_or.name: AND/OR logic module
logic_module_and_or.description: Industrial logic brick implementing simple AND/OR combinations of discrete control signals.

logic_module_flipflop.name: flip-flop logic module
logic_module_flipflop.description: Set-reset flip-flop module that latches control states for relays, alarms and interlocks.

logic_module_not.name: NOT logic module
logic_module_not.description: Logic module that inverts a discrete signal for safety chains and permissive logic.

motor_ac_induction_small.name: small AC induction motor
motor_ac_induction_small.description: Standard squirrel-cage induction motor for pumps, fans and conveyor drives.
motor_ac_induction_small.recipe: steel_shaft + armature_core_laminated + magnet_core_wrought + copper_wire_insulated + steel_plate_rolled -> motor_ac_induction_small

network_ac_district.name: AC district network segment
network_ac_district.description: Named slice of the three-phase AC grid, bundling feeders, loads and switchgear into one model.
network_ac_district.recipe: switchboard_panel_wooden + bus_bar_copper + copper_wire_insulated + porcelain_insulator_pin + steel_beam -> network_ac_district

panel_hmi_basic.name: basic HMI panel
panel_hmi_basic.description: Operator touch panel or button-box that exposes key controls and trends for one system.

panel_mimic_ac_grid.name: AC grid mimic panel
panel_mimic_ac_grid.description: Large mimic board showing breakers, buses and flows for an AC power network.
panel_mimic_ac_grid.recipe: steel_plate_rolled + bus_bar_copper + instrument_ammeter_panel + instrument_voltmeter_panel + relay_electromagnetic -> panel_mimic_ac_grid

plc_cpu_module.name: PLC CPU module
plc_cpu_module.description: Central processor module of a PLC rack, running ladder or function-block programs.

plc_io_module.name: PLC I/O module
plc_io_module.description: Input-output module that terminates sensors and actuators into the PLC backplane.

plc_rack_basic.name: basic PLC rack
plc_rack_basic.description: Backplane chassis providing power and data bus for multiple PLC CPU and I/O modules.

rectenna_ground_field.name: rectenna ground field
rectenna_ground_field.description: Widely spaced array of rectifying antenna elements that turn incoming microwave beams into DC.

rectifier_bridge_silicon.name: silicon bridge rectifier
rectifier_bridge_silicon.description: Packaged four-diode bridge for turning three-phase or single-phase AC into DC power.

rectifier_mercury_arc.name: mercury-arc rectifier
rectifier_mercury_arc.description: Bulky glass-and-metal mercury-arc rectifier for heavy DC traction and plating loads.

relay_electromagnetic.name: electromagnetic relay
relay_electromagnetic.description: Coil-driven relay that switches power or logic circuits with galvanic isolation.

relay_station_hilltop.name: hilltop relay station
relay_station_hilltop.description: Small shelter with mast and repeaters placed on high ground to extend RF and microwave links.

robot_arm_industrial_basic.name: basic industrial robot arm
robot_arm_industrial_basic.description: Six-axis industrial robot arm for palletising, tending machines and simple assembly tasks.
robot_arm_industrial_basic.recipe: 6x motor_ac_induction_small + plc_cpu_module + steel_beam + steel_shaft + bus_bar_copper -> robot_arm_industrial_basic

safety_cage_industrial.name: industrial safety cage
safety_cage_industrial.description: Steel mesh cage and interlocked doors that fence off hazardous machinery or drops.

sensor_level_tank.name: tank level sensor
sensor_level_tank.description: Level transmitter for tanks, reporting liquid height into process and safety loops.

sensor_position_limit.name: limit position sensor
sensor_position_limit.description: Limit switch or proximity sensor used to confirm actuator positions and travel limits.

sensor_pressure_boiler.name: boiler pressure sensor
sensor_pressure_boiler.description: Pressure transmitter rated for boiler service, feeding readings to controllers and alarms.

sensor_speed_line.name: line speed sensor
sensor_speed_line.description: Tachometer or encoder assembly used to sense conveyor or roller line surface speed.

silicon_wafer_raw.name: raw silicon wafer
silicon_wafer_raw.description: Unchecked silicon wafer blank ready for diffusion, lithography and dicing into chips. Reduced from quartz sand with carbon at electric-arc heat, then sliced. 2026-05-29 audit fix: empty placeholder closed with a real recipe.

switchyard_high_voltage.name: high-voltage switchyard
switchyard_high_voltage.description: Outdoor yard of breakers, buses and transformers tying generators into the high-voltage grid.

tracking_radar_ground.name: ground tracking radar
tracking_radar_ground.description: Precision ground radar used to track rockets, satellites and debris in flight.

transformer_step_down.name: step-down transformer
transformer_step_down.description: Power transformer that steps down transmission-level voltages to usable distribution levels.

transformer_step_up.name: step-up transformer
transformer_step_up.description: Power transformer that steps up generator output to long-distance transmission voltages.

transistor_npn_signal.name: signal NPN transistor
transistor_npn_signal.description: Small-signal NPN bipolar transistor for amplifiers, oscillators and logic stages.

tube_diode_glass.name: glass diode tube
tube_diode_glass.description: Glass-envelope vacuum diode used in early rectifiers and detector stages.

tube_triode_glass.name: glass triode tube
tube_triode_glass.description: General-purpose triode vacuum tube for early amplifiers and oscillator service.

vacuum_pump_lab.name: laboratory vacuum pump
vacuum_pump_lab.description: Bench vacuum pump used for tube work, semiconductor processing and general laboratory tasks.

arc_furnace_electric.name: electric arc furnace
arc_furnace_electric.purpose: Melt and refine steel and alloys with an electric arc
arc_furnace_electric.description: A three-electrode arc furnace. Strikes an electric arc through the charge, reaching temperatures charcoal cannot. Draws heavy AC power on its top face; pair it with a generator and step-up transformer.

assembler_workshop.name: assembly cell
assembler_workshop.purpose: Combine finished parts into devices and circuits
assembler_workshop.description: A precision assembly cell with two articulated arms and a feed conveyor. Combines components into devices and sub-assemblies. Draws electrical power (AC or DC) on its top face.

brine_solution.name: brine solution
brine_solution.purpose: Saturated NaCl feed for membrane electrolysis
brine_solution.description: Concentrated sodium chloride solution made by dissolving halite in water. Fed to a membrane electrolysis cell to split into chlorine gas, caustic soda (NaOH), and hydrogen gas simultaneously.

gas_chlorine.name: chlorine gas
gas_chlorine.purpose: Reactive halogen; feedstock for HCl, bleach, and PVC
gas_chlorine.description: Chlorine (Cl2) produced at the anode of a membrane chlor-alkali cell from brine, or at the cathode of a Downs cell from molten NaCl. Combined with hydrogen to give HCl; used with sodium metal to close the Hunter-process loop for titanium.

gas_co2.name: carbon dioxide gas
gas_co2.purpose: Oxidation byproduct of smelting and electrolytic reduction
gas_co2.description: Carbon dioxide (CO2) released during carbothermic reduction in the blast furnace, arc furnace, and Hall-Heroult cell (2Al2O3 + 3C -> 4Al + 3CO2). Vent safely at the vent stack.

sodium_metal.name: sodium metal
sodium_metal.purpose: Reactive alkali metal; Hunter-process Ti reductant
sodium_metal.description: Pure sodium metal produced by Downs electrolysis of molten NaCl at ~600C. Extremely reactive with water and air -- store under mineral oil. Used as the reductant in the Hunter process to convert TiCl4 to titanium sponge at Space tier.

acid_hydrofluoric.name: hydrofluoric acid
acid_hydrofluoric.purpose: Fluorinating agent; etches glass and silica
acid_hydrofluoric.description: Hydrofluoric acid (HF) made by reacting fluorite with hot concentrated sulfuric acid: CaF2 + H2SO4 -> 2HF + CaSO4 (gypsum). Byproduct is refined gypsum. Enables cryolite synthesis (Hall-Heroult), TiCl4 purification, and the UF6 nuclear conversion route.

waste_gypsum_refined.name: refined gypsum
waste_gypsum_refined.description: Calcium sulfate precipitate (CaSO4) produced when fluorite is digested in sulfuric acid. Chemically identical to natural gypsum; can be used for plasterwork, cement retarder, or soil amendment.

cryolite.name: cryolite
cryolite.purpose: Molten fluoride bath for aluminium electrolysis
cryolite.description: Sodium aluminium fluoride (Na3AlF6) synthesised from HF, alumina, and caustic soda. Dissolved in a reduction pot to lower the melting point of alumina from 2072C to ~960C, making Hall-Heroult electrolysis practical. Consumed slowly; must be replenished.

carbon_anode.name: carbon anode block
carbon_anode.purpose: Sacrificial consumable anode for electrolytic reduction
carbon_anode.description: Prebaked carbon block made from petroleum coke and coal tar pitch, baked at ~1200C then graphitized at ~2800C (Acheson process). Consumed as CO2 during Hall-Heroult aluminium smelting. Also used as electrodes in electric arc furnaces.

silicon_mg_grade.name: metallurgical-grade silicon
silicon_mg_grade.purpose: 98% Si; trichlorosilane feedstock at Solid-State tier
silicon_mg_grade.description: Metallurgical-grade silicon (MG-Si, ~98% pure) produced by carbothermic reduction of quartz in an electric arc furnace: SiO2 + 2C -> Si + 2CO. Far too impure for electronics. Reacted with HCl to give trichlorosilane (SiHCl3), then upgraded to 9N polysilicon via the Siemens CVD process at Solid-State tier.

ferrochrome.name: ferrochrome
ferrochrome.purpose: Fe-Cr master alloy; primary chromium addition for steel
ferrochrome.description: Iron-chromium ferroalloy (~50-70% Cr) produced by carbothermic reduction of chromite in an electric arc furnace. The only practical way to add chromium to steel. Essential for stainless steel, tool steel, and Inconel-type superalloys.

ferronickel.name: ferronickel
ferronickel.purpose: Fe-Ni master alloy; nickel addition for stainless and superalloys
ferronickel.description: Iron-nickel ferroalloy (20-40% Ni) produced by smelting pentlandite ore in an electric arc furnace with coke and limestone flux. Direct feed for austenitic stainless steel (18-8 grade) and nickel-base superalloy VIM melts.

nickel_concentrate.name: nickel concentrate
nickel_concentrate.description: Upgraded pentlandite fraction after froth flotation. Higher Ni sulfide content, lower gangue. Direct feed for matte smelting and for Mond carbonyl refining to nickel cathode.

nickel_cathode.name: nickel cathode
nickel_cathode.purpose: 99.9%+ Ni; superalloy and battery electrode feed
nickel_cathode.description: High-purity nickel produced via the Mond carbonyl process (Ni + 4CO -> Ni(CO)4 -> decompose at 230C) or by electrowinning from nickel sulfate solution. Feed metal for vacuum-induction melted superalloys and NiMH electrodes.

stainless_steel_ingot.name: stainless steel ingot
stainless_steel_ingot.description: Austenitic stainless steel (roughly 304-grade: ~18% Cr, ~8% Ni, balance Fe) produced by charging ferrochrome and ferronickel into an electric arc furnace then argon-oxygen decarburising (AOD converter). Essential for chemical plant piping, cryogenic tank shells, rocket ground support equipment, and food-contact surfaces.

stainless_steel_sheet.name: stainless steel sheet
stainless_steel_sheet.purpose: Rolled stainless stock; tanks, heat exchangers, cryogenic skins
stainless_steel_sheet.description: Stainless steel hot-rolled then cold-finished into sheet. Used for pressure vessels, heat exchangers, rocket LOX tank skins, and ground support equipment where stainless strength and cryogenic toughness are both needed.

bucket_wood.name: wooden bucket
bucket_wood.description: Open bucket for water and safe slurries. Not gas-safe. Spills possible.

bucket_clay.name: clay bucket
bucket_clay.description: Clay bucket for water and safe slurries. Not gas-safe. Spills possible.

bucket_iron.name: iron bucket
bucket_iron.description: Iron bucket for water and safe slurries. Not gas-safe. Spills possible.

cell_glass.name: glass cell
cell_glass.description: Sealed glass cell for liquids and safe reagents. Not pressure-rated.

cell_metal.name: metal cell
cell_metal.description: Sealed metal cell for liquids and reagents. Not pressure-rated.

cylinder_gas_basic.name: basic gas cylinder
cylinder_gas_basic.description: Basic pressure vessel for compressed gases. Tier 1 pressure rating.

station_fluid_handler.name: fluid handler station
station_fluid_handler.description: Placeholder fluid handling station for pumps/taps/transfer.

station_gas_compressor.name: gas compressor station
station_gas_compressor.description: Placeholder compressor station for gas handling and cylinder fills.

station_vent_stack.name: vent stack
station_vent_stack.description: Placeholder vent stack for controlled gas release.

gas_hydrogen.name: hydrogen gas
gas_hydrogen.description: Elemental hydrogen gas (H2). Placeholder for electrolysis/reforming chains.

gas_oxygen.name: oxygen gas
gas_oxygen.description: Elemental oxygen gas (O2). Placeholder for air separation or electrolysis.

gas_nitrogen.name: nitrogen gas
gas_nitrogen.description: Elemental nitrogen gas (N2). Placeholder for air separation.

gas_helium.name: helium gas
gas_helium.description: Elemental helium gas (He). Placeholder for natural gas processing.

gas_ammonia.name: ammonia gas
gas_ammonia.description: Ammonia gas (NH3). Placeholder for Haber-Bosch output handling.

acid_sulfuric.name: sulfuric acid
acid_sulfuric.description: Concentrated ~98% sulfuric acid -- the keystone industrial reagent. Made by the Contact Process (SO2->SO3->oleum->acid) or, earlier and weaker, the lead chamber route. Feeds leaching, electrolyte, HF, and yellowcake chains.

peroxide_hydrogen.name: hydrogen peroxide
peroxide_hydrogen.description: Hydrogen peroxide solution (H2O2). Placeholder for industrial synthesis.

cyanide_solution.name: cyanide solution
cyanide_solution.description: Aqueous cyanide (e.g. NaCN(aq)); placeholder for leaching chemistry.

ammonium_hydroxide.name: ammonium hydroxide
ammonium_hydroxide.description: Aqueous ammonia (NH4OH); placeholder for industrial ammonia handling.

sodium_hydroxide.name: sodium hydroxide
sodium_hydroxide.description: Sodium hydroxide solution (NaOH). Placeholder for chlor-alkali chain.

salt_sodium_sulfate.name: sodium sulfate
salt_sodium_sulfate.description: Sodium sulfate (Na2SO4). Placeholder byproduct of acid/base neutralization.

bucket_wood_water_raw.name: wooden bucket (water)
bucket_wood_water_raw.description: Wooden bucket filled with raw water.

bucket_clay_water_raw.name: clay bucket (water)
bucket_clay_water_raw.description: Clay bucket filled with raw water.

bucket_iron_water_raw.name: iron bucket (water)
bucket_iron_water_raw.description: Iron bucket filled with raw water.

cell_glass_water_raw.name: glass cell (water)
cell_glass_water_raw.description: Glass cell filled with raw water.

cell_metal_water_raw.name: metal cell (water)
cell_metal_water_raw.description: Metal cell filled with raw water.

cell_metal_acid_sulfuric.name: metal cell (sulfuric acid)
cell_metal_acid_sulfuric.description: Metal cell filled with sulfuric acid (compatibility required).

cell_metal_sodium_hydroxide.name: metal cell (sodium hydroxide)
cell_metal_sodium_hydroxide.description: Metal cell filled with sodium hydroxide solution.

cylinder_hydrogen.name: hydrogen cylinder
cylinder_hydrogen.description: Hydrogen stored in a basic pressure cylinder (tier 1).

cylinder_oxygen.name: oxygen cylinder
cylinder_oxygen.description: Oxygen stored in a basic pressure cylinder (tier 1).

cylinder_nitrogen.name: nitrogen cylinder
cylinder_nitrogen.description: Nitrogen stored in a basic pressure cylinder (tier 1).

cylinder_helium.name: helium cylinder
cylinder_helium.description: Helium stored in a basic pressure cylinder (tier 1).

cylinder_ammonia.name: ammonia cylinder
cylinder_ammonia.description: Ammonia stored in a basic pressure cylinder (tier 1).

cylinder_gas_basic_empty.name: empty gas cylinder
cylinder_gas_basic_empty.description: Empty pressure cylinder after venting. Placeholder for safety handling.

mix_neutralization_sulfate.name: neutralization mix (sulfate)
mix_neutralization_sulfate.description: Placeholder neutralization: sulfuric acid + sodium hydroxide → sodium sulfate + water.

mix_ammonia_solution.name: ammonia solution mix
mix_ammonia_solution.description: Placeholder dissolution: ammonia gas + water → ammonium hydroxide.

token_solid_state_tier_complete.name: token: solid-state tier complete
token_solid_state_tier_complete.description: Completion token for Tier 5 Solid-State & Automation; gates Tier 6 content.

gas_hcl.name: hydrochloric acid gas
gas_hcl.description: Hydrogen chloride (HCl) produced by direct synthesis: H2 + Cl2 -> 2HCl over activated charcoal. Also recovered from the Siemens CVD loop (2SiHCl3 + 2H2 -> 2Si + 6HCl). Reacted with metallurgical-grade silicon to give trichlorosilane.

trichlorosilane.name: trichlorosilane
trichlorosilane.description: Trichlorosilane (SiHCl3) made by reacting metallurgical-grade silicon with hydrogen chloride at ~300C: Si + 3HCl -> SiHCl3 + H2. Fractionally distilled to extremely high purity. Decomposed in the Siemens reactor to deposit 9N pure polysilicon.

polysilicon_9n.name: electronic-grade polysilicon
polysilicon_9n.description: Electronic-grade polysilicon (9N pure) deposited onto glowing silicon rods in a bell-jar Siemens reactor: 2SiHCl3 + 2H2 -> 2Si + 6HCl. The rods grow outward at ~1 mm/h. Recovered HCl is recycled to the trichlorosilane step. Six orders of magnitude purer than metallurgical grade.

silicon_ingot_czochralski.name: Czochralski silicon ingot
silicon_ingot_czochralski.description: Monocrystalline silicon ingot grown by the Czochralski method: polysilicon melted in a silica crucible, a seed crystal lowered to the surface and slowly pulled upward while rotating. One continuous crystal grows behind the seed. Dopant (boron or phosphorus) added to the melt sets resistivity.

silicon_wafer_polished.name: polished silicon wafer
silicon_wafer_polished.purpose: Device-grade wafer for ICs and solar cells
silicon_wafer_polished.description: Silicon wafer wire-sawn from a Czochralski ingot, then lapped, chemically-mechanically polished (CMP) to sub-nanometre flatness, and cleaned in a sequence of acid and base baths. The mirror-polished surface is the starting canvas for photolithography and ion-implant doping.

logic_chip.name: logic chip
logic_chip.purpose: Integrated circuit for digital control and computation
logic_chip.description: Silicon IC fabricated from a polished wafer: define active regions by ion implantation, grow gate oxide, deposit and pattern polysilicon gates, deposit and CMP metal interconnects through multiple lithography-etch cycles, then dice into individual chips. Feeds PLCs, flight computers, and SCADA controllers.

acrylonitrile.name: acrylonitrile
acrylonitrile.purpose: CH2=CHCN -- polymerizes to PAN fiber precursor
acrylonitrile.description: Acrylonitrile (vinyl cyanide, C3H3N) produced via the Sohio process: propylene (from coal-tar light oil) + ammonia + oxygen -> acrylonitrile + water, over a bismuth molybdate catalyst. Polymerized to polyacrylonitrile (PAN) and spun into the precursor tow for aerospace carbon fiber.

pan_fiber.name: PAN precursor fiber
pan_fiber.purpose: Stabilised polyacrylonitrile fiber; carbon fiber precursor
pan_fiber.description: Polyacrylonitrile (PAN) tow spun from acrylonitrile solution, then stabilised (oxidised) in air at 200-300C to form a ladder polymer. The thermally stable precursor is ready for high-temperature carbonization. Precursor quality determines final fiber strength.

carbon_fiber.name: carbon fiber tow
carbon_fiber.purpose: High-strength carbon fiber; ~3.5 GPa tensile strength
carbon_fiber.description: Carbon fiber produced by carbonizing stabilised PAN tow at 1000-1500C in a nitrogen atmosphere: all non-carbon elements are driven off, leaving >92% carbon in a turbostratic graphite microstructure. Tensile strength 3.5-7 GPa; modulus 230-600 GPa. Lightest structural reinforcement per unit stiffness.

epoxy_resin.name: epoxy resin
epoxy_resin.purpose: Thermosetting polymer matrix for CFRP prepregs
epoxy_resin.description: Epoxy resin (bisphenol-A diglycidyl ether) produced from coal-tar-derived phenol and epichlorohydrin. Two-part system (resin + amine hardener) that crosslinks into a rigid thermoset when cured. Mixed with carbon fiber to make structural CFRP prepregs for rocket fairings, interstages, and aeroshell skins.

cfrp_panel.name: CFRP structural panel
cfrp_panel.purpose: Carbon fiber reinforced polymer; lightest load-bearing structure
cfrp_panel.description: CFRP panel made by impregnating carbon fiber tow with epoxy resin (prepreg), laying up alternating ply orientations (0/45/90/-45), vacuum-bagging, and autoclave-curing at 130-180C under 6-7 bar. Specific strength far exceeds steel and aluminum. Used for rocket interstages, payload fairings, aeroshell structures, and satellite buses.

attitude_control_array.name: attitude control array
attitude_control_array.description: Clustered reaction wheels or thrusters used to hold or slew spacecraft attitude precisely.

docking_port_standard.name: standard docking port
docking_port_standard.description: Mechanical and fluid-electrical interface used to hard-dock station modules, landers and freighters.

drill_regolith_robotic.name: robotic regolith drill
drill_regolith_robotic.description: Autonomous drill head built to bite into lunar or asteroidal regolith and feed ISRU hoppers.

fuel_rod_uranium_enriched.name: enriched uranium fuel rod
fuel_rod_uranium_enriched.description: Clad fuel rod with enriched uranium oxide pellets for light-water power reactors.

guidance_coil_array.name: guidance coil array
guidance_coil_array.description: Array of coils and sensors used in guidance test stands and mass driver launch systems.

hopper_regolith_bulk.name: bulk regolith hopper
hopper_regolith_bulk.description: Heavy-duty hopper that buffers crushed regolith between drills, conveyors and ISRU plants.

isru_ice_extractor_demo.name: demo ice ISRU extractor
isru_ice_extractor_demo.description: Demonstration in-situ resource utilization skid that mines ice and vents captured volatiles.

lander_lunar_robotic.name: robotic lunar lander
lander_lunar_robotic.description: Uncrewed lander bus with legs, tanks and avionics for soft-landing cargo on the lunar surface.
lander_lunar_robotic.recipe: tank_propellant_aluminum + rocket_engine_kerolox_test + attitude_control_array + avionics_flight_computer + 4x alloy_aluminum_aerospace -> lander_lunar_robotic

launch_pad_complex_basic.name: basic launch pad complex
launch_pad_complex_basic.description: Minimal concrete pad, flame trench and fixed service structures for small orbital-class rockets.

life_support_loop_basic.name: basic life-support loop
life_support_loop_basic.description: Packaged system that circulates air and water, scrubs CO2 and controls humidity for small habitats.

mass_driver_lunar_track.name: lunar mass driver track
mass_driver_lunar_track.description: Long evacuated track of powered coils that flings bulk payloads off the Moon without rockets.

microwave_beamer_downlink.name: microwave power beamer
microwave_beamer_downlink.description: Phased microwave transmitter that converts DC power into tight beams aimed at rectennas.

power_plant_lunar_solar.name: lunar solar power plant
power_plant_lunar_solar.description: Large field of lunar solar arrays, inverters and storage feeding local loads and beamers.

propellant_kerosene_refined.name: refined kerosene propellant
propellant_kerosene_refined.description: Highly refined kerosene (RP-1-like) used as fuel in kerolox rocket engines.

propellant_lox_distilled.name: distilled LOX propellant
propellant_lox_distilled.description: Deep-cooled liquid oxygen oxidiser stored in insulated tanks for launch vehicles.

reactor_nuclear_light_water.name: light-water nuclear reactor
reactor_nuclear_light_water.description: Pressurised light-water reactor vessel with core, control rods and primary loop.
reactor_nuclear_light_water.recipe: 4x fuel_rod_uranium_enriched + 6x steel_plate_rolled + 2x control_valve_steam + vacuum_pump_lab + generator_ac_three_phase -> reactor_nuclear_light_water

rocket_engine_kerolox_test.name: kerolox test rocket engine
rocket_engine_kerolox_test.description: Ground-mounted kerolox engine used on a vertical stand for firing, tuning and data gathering.
rocket_engine_kerolox_test.recipe: 4x steel_plate_rolled + 4x bus_bar_copper + 2x control_valve_steam + refractory_brick_silica + 2x sensor_pressure_boiler -> rocket_engine_kerolox_test

rocket_stack_orbital_three_stage.name: orbital three-stage rocket stack
rocket_stack_orbital_three_stage.description: Fully stacked, fuelled three-stage kerolox launch vehicle ready on the pad.
rocket_stack_orbital_three_stage.recipe: 3x tank_propellant_aluminum + 3x rocket_engine_kerolox_test + guidance_coil_array + attitude_control_array + avionics_flight_computer -> rocket_stack_orbital_three_stage

sample_return_capsule.name: sample return capsule
sample_return_capsule.description: Small ablative capsule designed to bring high-value samples back through atmosphere intact.

satellite_comms_basic.name: basic comms satellite
satellite_comms_basic.description: Simple spin- or three-axis-stabilised communications satellite with limited bandwidth.
satellite_comms_basic.recipe: 2x cell_photovoltaic + microwave_beamer_downlink + avionics_flight_computer + attitude_control_array + 2x alloy_aluminum_aerospace -> satellite_comms_basic

satellite_tech_demo.name: technology demonstrator satellite
satellite_tech_demo.description: Instrumented satellite used to validate new power, propulsion or control technologies on orbit.

sps_solar_array_huge.name: huge SPS solar array
sps_solar_array_huge.description: Vast orbiting photovoltaic array feeding rectennas via microwave power beamers.

station_module_core.name: station core module
station_module_core.description: Pressurised core module with docking ports, utilities and control for an orbital station.

station_module_solar_truss.name: station solar truss module
station_module_solar_truss.description: Truss segment carrying solar arrays, radiators and routing for power and fluids.

test_stand_vertical.name: vertical engine test stand
test_stand_vertical.description: Reinforced vertical stand with plumbing and instrumentation for firing rocket engines safely.

gas_syngas.name: synthesis gas
gas_syngas.description: Steam-gasified syngas (CO + H2); the carbon-and-hydrogen building block for synthetic fuels.

fuel_kerosene_synthetic.name: synthetic kerosene
fuel_kerosene_synthetic.description: Fischer-Tropsch kerosene condensed from syngas; refined further into rocket-grade propellant.

cell_photovoltaic.name: photovoltaic cell
cell_photovoltaic.description: Doped and metallised silicon cell that turns sunlight into electric current for space arrays.

yellowcake_u3o8.name: yellowcake
yellowcake_u3o8.description: Acid-leached uranium concentrate (U3O8) milled from uraninite ore; first step of the fuel cycle.

uf6_uranium_hexafluoride.name: uranium hexafluoride
uf6_uranium_hexafluoride.description: Volatile uranium hexafluoride produced by converting yellowcake; the gas fed to enrichment.

uf6_enriched_leu.name: enriched UF6 (LEU)
uf6_enriched_leu.description: Centrifuge-enriched low-enriched uranium hexafluoride, raised to reactor-grade U-235 fraction.

fuel_pellet_uo2.name: uranium dioxide pellet
fuel_pellet_uo2.description: Sintered uranium dioxide ceramic pellet deconverted from enriched UF6; stacked inside fuel rods.

tank_propellant_aluminum.name: aluminum propellant tank
tank_propellant_aluminum.description: Welded aerospace-aluminum tank with insulation and baffles for cryogenic propellant stages.

avionics_flight_computer.name: flight computer
avionics_flight_computer.description: Rugged guidance, navigation and control computer that runs spacecraft and launch-vehicle avionics.

titanium_tetrachloride.name: titanium tetrachloride
titanium_tetrachloride.purpose: TiCl4 -- intermediate between ilmenite and Ti sponge
titanium_tetrachloride.description: Titanium tetrachloride (TiCl4, colloquially 'tickle') produced by fluidized-bed chlorination of ilmenite with coke and chlorine: TiO2 + 2Cl2 + 2C -> TiCl4 + 2CO. Iron and other metal chlorides are removed by fractional distillation before reduction.

titanium_sponge.name: titanium sponge
titanium_sponge.purpose: Porous metallic Ti; feedstock for VAR ingot
titanium_sponge.description: Titanium sponge produced by the Hunter process: TiCl4 vapour reduced by molten sodium at ~800C in a sealed argon-purged retort. The reaction TiCl4 + 4Na -> Ti + 4NaCl is exothermic. The sponge mass is crushed out and the NaCl byproduct washed away. Sodium is recycled via electrolysis (Downs cell).

titanium_ingot.name: titanium ingot
titanium_ingot.description: Titanium ingot produced by vacuum arc remelting: a consumable electrode pressed from sponge is arc-melted into a water-cooled copper crucible under high vacuum. Double- or triple-melt (triple-VAR) is standard for rotating aerospace components, eliminating segregation and high-density inclusions.

alloy_ti_6al_4v.name: Ti-6Al-4V titanium alloy
alloy_ti_6al_4v.purpose: Workhorse titanium alloy -- 90% Ti, 6% Al, 4% V
alloy_ti_6al_4v.description: Ti-6Al-4V (grade 5), the most widely used titanium alloy. Alpha-beta microstructure delivers ~1100 MPa ultimate tensile strength, good ductility, and full weldability. Used for rocket turbopump housings, thrust chamber forgings, structural bulkheads, pressure vessels, and heat shields.

titanium_plate.name: titanium alloy plate
titanium_plate.purpose: Rolled Ti-6Al-4V; bulkheads, tank domes, heat shields
titanium_plate.description: Ti-6Al-4V hot-forged and rolled into plate. Corrosion-proof against RP-1 and liquid oxygen, far lighter than steel for equivalent strength. Used for LOX bulkheads, interstage frames, and reentry heat shield substructure.

tungsten_oxide.name: tungsten trioxide
tungsten_oxide.purpose: WO3 -- calcined APT; hydrogen reduction feedstock
tungsten_oxide.description: Tungsten trioxide (WO3) produced by NaOH pressure digestion of wolframite (forming Na2WO4 solution), solvent extraction to remove Mo and other impurities, precipitation as ammonium paratungstate (APT) by pH adjustment, and calcination at ~600C.

tungsten_powder.name: tungsten metal powder
tungsten_powder.purpose: Reduced W powder -- highest melting point of any element
tungsten_powder.description: Tungsten metal powder produced by hydrogen reduction of WO3 at 700-1000C in a tube furnace: WO3 + 3H2 -> W + 3H2O. Particle size (0.5-10 micron) determines sintered density. Highest melting point of any element (3422C). Used for nozzle throats, X-ray targets, and high-temperature electrodes.

tungsten_sintered_rod.name: sintered tungsten rod
tungsten_sintered_rod.purpose: Dense W rod for nozzle throats, electrodes, and shielding
tungsten_sintered_rod.description: Tungsten rod made by cold-pressing powder into a bar blank, then sintering at ~2300C to >95% theoretical density, followed by swaging or rotary forging to close residual pores. Inserted as nozzle-throat liners in solid and hybrid rocket motors where nothing else survives the combination of high temperature, pressure, and abrasive flow.

niobium_oxide.name: niobium pentoxide
niobium_oxide.description: Niobium pentoxide (Nb2O5) produced by dissolving columbite in hot HF, selectively extracting Nb (over Ta and Fe) with MIBK solvent, stripping into water, precipitating as Nb(OH)5, and calcining to Nb2O5. Must be separated from tantalum for electronics-grade Nb.

ferroniobium.name: ferroniobium
ferroniobium.purpose: FeNb master alloy; grain refiner for HSLA steels and superalloys
ferroniobium.description: Ferroniobium (~65% Nb) produced by aluminothermic reduction: 3Nb2O5 + 10Al -> 6Nb + 5Al2O3, in a refractory-lined reaction vessel. Crushed, blended with iron scrap for target Nb%, and sold as master alloy. Added to micro-alloyed pipeline steels, stainless grades, and nickel superalloys (Inconel 718 holds 5% Nb) for grain refinement and creep resistance.

zirconium_tetrachloride.name: zirconium tetrachloride
zirconium_tetrachloride.description: Zirconium tetrachloride (ZrCl4) from carbo-chlorination of zircon sand: ZrSiO4 + 4Cl2 + 4C -> ZrCl4 + SiCl4 + 4CO. Separated from SiCl4 by fractional condensation. Hafnium chloride (HfCl4) must be further separated for nuclear-grade Zr (< 100 ppm Hf), since hafnium is a strong neutron absorber.

zirconium_sponge.name: zirconium sponge
zirconium_sponge.purpose: Metallic Zr sponge; zircaloy and reactor component feedstock
zirconium_sponge.description: Zirconium sponge produced by Kroll reduction: ZrCl4 + 2Mg -> Zr + 2MgCl2 at ~900C in an argon-purged retort. MgCl2 is removed by vacuum distillation; the sponge is crushed and sampled for Hf content. Nuclear-grade requires < 100 ppm Hf; the Hf removed goes to naval reactor control rods.

alloy_zircaloy.name: zircaloy cladding alloy
alloy_zircaloy.purpose: Nuclear-grade Zr alloy; fuel rod cladding
alloy_zircaloy.description: Zircaloy-2 or -4 (Zr + 1.2-1.5% Sn + 0.1% Fe + 0.1% Cr) vacuum-induction melted from hafnium-free sponge. Near-transparent to thermal neutrons, mechanically stable to ~350C in a water coolant, and corrosion-resistant. The standard cladding for LWR fuel rods worldwide.

inconel_ingot.name: Inconel superalloy ingot
inconel_ingot.purpose: Ni-Cr-Fe-Nb superalloy; turbopumps and combustion chambers
inconel_ingot.description: Inconel-718-like superalloy (~52% Ni, 19% Cr, 18% Fe, 5% Nb, 3% Mo) produced by vacuum induction melting (VIM) for chemistry control, then vacuum arc remelting (VAR) for segregation elimination. Retains full strength to ~700C; excellent oxidation and hot-corrosion resistance. Used for turbopump rotating components, combustion chamber liners, and exhaust manifolds.

ash.name: ash
ash.description: Fine mineral residue left when wood or other fuel burns out; a liming and lye feedstock.

gas.name: wood gas
gas.purpose: Flammable off-gas driven off during coking
gas.description: Volatile off-gas released while coking coal; flammable and can be burned for heat instead of vented.

CO2.name: carbon dioxide
CO2.description: Gas driven off when limestone is calcined to quicklime; inert exhaust for now.

slag.name: slag
slag.purpose: Glassy waste skimmed from a smelt
slag.description: Glassy, non-metallic waste that floats on molten metal and is poured or skimmed off.

refining_slag.name: refining slag
refining_slag.description: Oxidised impurities skimmed during metal refining; richer in flux residue than raw smelting slag.

copper_blister.name: blister copper
copper_blister.purpose: 98-99% Cu cast as flat anode; electrorefining feed
copper_blister.description: ~98-99.5% Cu tapped from the Peirce-Smith converter, blistered by trapped SO2. Either fire-refined to tough-pitch ingot or cast to anodes for the tankhouse.

copper_cathode.name: copper cathode
copper_cathode.description: 99.99% Cu plated out in the electrolytic refining cell. Remelted under charcoal cover into oxygen-free refined ingot for wire and electronics.

crushed_ore_chalcopyrite.name: crushed chalcopyrite
crushed_ore_chalcopyrite.description: Chalcopyrite stamped to gravel to begin liberating sulfide grains from silicate gangue.

ground_ore_chalcopyrite.name: ground chalcopyrite
ground_ore_chalcopyrite.description: Chalcopyrite ground to ~75 micron so sulfide liberates cleanly for froth flotation.

calcine_chalcopyrite.name: roasted chalcopyrite calcine
calcine_chalcopyrite.description: Concentrate after a partial roast: part of the sulfur is burned off as SO2 and iron begins to oxidize, leaving a Cu2S + FeS calcine. Feed to the matte smelt.

copper_matte.name: copper matte
copper_matte.description: Copper and sulfur collected as a molten sulfide matte (Cu2S.FeS) beneath iron-silicate slag in the matte smelt. Converter feed.

copper_anode.name: copper anode
copper_anode.description: Blister/fire-refined copper cast as a flat anode and hung in the tankhouse. Dissolves into CuSO4/H2SO4; pure copper plates the cathode, precious metals drop as slime.

copper_plate.name: copper plate
copper_plate.description: Hot-rolled copper plate -- stock for sheet parts, heat exchangers, and electrical buswork.

copper_foil.name: copper foil
copper_foil.description: Copper rolled down thin -- gaskets, shielding, and early circuit/coil work.

copper_rod.name: copper rod
copper_rod.description: Rolled/forged round copper rod -- feedstock for fasteners, contacts, and mechanical parts.

copper_dust.name: copper dust
copper_dust.description: Filed/ground copper powder for alloying, brazing pastes, and powder metallurgy.

stone_dust.name: stone dust
stone_dust.description: Fine rock powder thrown off by the stamp mill. Usable as aggregate, abrasive, or kiln filler.

gas_so2.name: sulfur dioxide gas
gas_so2.description: Sulfur dioxide off-gas from roasting and converting. Real plants capture it for the Contact Process -- feedstock for sulfuric acid, not just waste.

anode_slime.name: anode slime
anode_slime.description: Insoluble Au/Ag/Se/Te sludge that drops beneath the anodes in the copper tankhouse. Refined separately for precious metals.

gas_so3.name: sulfur trioxide gas
gas_so3.purpose: SO3 from catalytic oxidation of SO2
gas_so3.description: Sulfur trioxide off the V2O5 contact beds. Fiercely hygroscopic -- never fed straight to water (it flashes to an unmanageable acid mist), so it is absorbed into strong acid as oleum instead.

oleum.name: oleum (fuming sulfuric acid)
oleum.description: Fuming sulfuric acid: SO3 absorbed into 97-98% acid. The safe carrier for SO3 -- diluted with a controlled amount of water it yields concentrated H2SO4 without the runaway mist.

acid_sulfuric_dilute.name: chamber acid (dilute H2SO4)
acid_sulfuric_dilute.purpose: Low-grade ~65-78% acid from the lead chamber
acid_sulfuric_dilute.description: Weak, slightly nitrous sulfuric acid straight from the lead chambers. Capped near 78% by the process -- good enough for pickling and fertilizer, but must be boiled down (Glover tower) for concentrated acid.
